messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Build a dashboard module with auth and an API, with unit tests and database stubs. Include modules A and B.
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Build a dashboard module with auth and an API, with unit tests and database stubs. Include modules A and B.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "design-architecture",
      "title": "Design system architecture and interfaces",
      "description": "Create high-level architecture diagrams, define component boundaries, REST API contracts, auth flow, data models, and interactions for Modules A and B and the dashboard.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Architecture diagram and API contract document reviewed and approved; endpoints, auth flows, and data models defined for Modules A and B and dashboard."
    },
    {
      "id": "setup-repo",
      "title": "Initialize repository and CI scaffolding",
      "description": "Initialize project repository, create folder structure for modules (A, B, auth, api, dashboard, tests), add CI pipeline skeleton and linting/prettier configs.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "design-architecture"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Repository created with branches, CI pipeline stubbed, linters configured, and base folders for each module present."
    },
    {
      "id": "create-db-stubs",
      "title": "Create database stubs and interfaces",
      "description": "Implement in-memory or mock database adapters and interfaces that simulate persistence operations required by Modules A, B, auth, and API; include basic seed data.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "setup-repo"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "DB stub package exposes CRUD methods with predictable responses; integration tests can run against stubs without external DB."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-module-a",
      "title": "Implement Module A core logic",
      "description": "Develop Module A services and controllers according to the API contract, using DB stubs for persistence and exportable interfaces for API integration.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "setup-repo",
        "create-db-stubs"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Module A implements required endpoints/services with mocked persistence and passes basic smoke tests against DB stubs."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-module-b",
      "title": "Implement Module B core logic",
      "description": "Develop Module B services and controllers per the contract, wired to DB stubs and exposing the interfaces required by API and dashboard.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "setup-repo",
        "create-db-stubs"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Module B provides its services and endpoints, integrates with DB stubs, and passes smoke tests defined in the API contract."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-auth-module",
      "title": "Implement authentication and authorization",
      "description": "Build auth module implementing login, token issuance/validation, role checks and middleware, using DB stubs for user data and token blacklisting where required.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "setup-repo",
        "create-db-stubs"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "high",
      "successCriteria": "Auth endpoints issue and validate tokens; middleware enforces auth on protected routes; auth behavior is verifiable using DB stubs."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-api-endpoints",
      "title": "Implement API endpoints and routing",
      "description": "Implement REST API endpoints that expose Module A, Module B, and dashboard data, applying auth middleware, input validation, and using DB stubs for data operations.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-auth-module",
        "implement-module-a",
        "implement-module-b",
        "create-db-stubs"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "high",
      "successCriteria": "All API endpoints respond as per contract, enforce auth rules, and return correct data using DB stubs; API passes integration smoke tests."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-dashboard-module",
      "title": "Build dashboard frontend/backend integration",
      "description": "Implement dashboard module that consumes the API, displays Module A and B data, enforces auth for protected views, and supports basic interactions defined in the spec.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-api-endpoints",
        "implement-auth-module",
        "implement-module-a",
        "implement-module-b"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "high",
      "successCriteria": "Dashboard surfaces data from API, respects auth/roles, and demonstrates end-to-end flows using the API with DB stubs."
    },
    {
      "id": "write-unit-tests",
      "title": "Write unit tests and CI checks",
      "description": "Author unit tests for Modules A and B, auth, API handlers, and dashboard logic using mocks and DB stubs; integrate tests into CI and set coverage targets.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-api-endpoints",
        "implement-auth-module",
        "implement-dashboard-module",
        "create-db-stubs"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Automated unit tests run in CI, covering critical paths; coverage meets the agreed threshold (e.g., 80% on core modules) and tests pass against DB stubs."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 9,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Decompose by deliverable components and typical development phases: design, repo setup, persistence stubs, implement individual modules (A and B), auth, API integration, dashboard implementation, and testing. Each subtask produces verifiable artifacts and depends only on earlier foundational steps to avoid circular dependencies."
}
